scripts.format: biome check --write --linter-enabled=false package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json drizzle.config.ts drizzle src
scripts.format:check: biome check --linter-enabled=false package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json drizzle.config.ts drizzle src
scripts.lint: biome lint package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json drizzle.config.ts drizzle src
scripts.lint:fix: biome lint --write package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json drizzle.config.ts drizzle src
